subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-09-02
subcodes.first_line: Because of material civilization, industry has progressed and sciences and arts have burgeoned but at the same time weapons of war and bloodshed
subcodes.first_line_orig: مدنیت مادی صنایع ترقی نموده علوم و فنون توسیع یافته همین قسم اسباب حرب و قتال و خونریزی و هدم بنیان انسانی
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
